title: Unitree momentum signals China is becoming a serious global robotics competitor
excerpt: Recent market coverage highlights Unitree's rising visibility in humanoid and quadruped robotics, with cost and scale as key competitive levers.

children.text: Source trend: Barron's and broader industry commentary on February 18, 2026.
robot.tv angle: The core story is no longer just demos. It is cost-performance at shipment scale and how quickly platforms move into repeat deployments.

title: Amazon's Blue Jay halt shows warehouse robotics programs are being held to tighter ROI standards
excerpt: Multiple outlets report Amazon halted Blue Jay after a short prototyping window, signaling stricter deployment economics for warehouse robotics bets.

children.text: Source trend: TechCrunch and Business Insider coverage on February 17-18, 2026.
robot.tv angle: In logistics robotics, capital now follows measurable throughput and reliability gains, not prototype novelty.
